prompt_blocks.artwork_reference: Use the resolved root view file 'base_artwork_gemini_job_1782392482_6423_v1.png' as the authoritative physical reference for the artwork. The artwork's original composition, proportions, colors, marks, textures, and overall visual identity must be preserved exactly, with no modifications.
prompt_blocks.physical_artwork_spec: The physical object is a 'stretched_canvas' with dimensions of 120cm width × 80cm height × 4cm depth (horizontal orientation). Visible edges: Yes. Edge finish: not specified. Paint continues on edges: not detected.
prompt_blocks.scene_context: The scene is a gallery/residential space with a refined and contemplative atmosphere. Context description: An abstract artwork displays three distinct, vibrantly colored geometric forms set within a deep, layered field of dark reds and browns.. The artwork prominently features three luminous block-like forms, asymmetrically placed across an expansive, dark terrain. The composition is organized by subtle horizontal divisions, suggesting layered fields that recede into depth. Within these blocks, vibrant turquoise and energetic red pigments are applied with visible texture and active brushwork. A profound, almost atmospheric quality emerges from the interplay of deep background and luminous foreground elements. This piece holds a quiet, yet powerful, structural presence across its considerable horizontal format.
prompt_blocks.artwork_placement: The artwork must be hung flat and centered on a vertical wall. All edges of the canvas must be visible to show its 4cm depth, casting realistic, soft shadows onto the wall.
prompt_blocks.camera_direction: The camera view is biased towards a frontal angle. The composition must be a close-up or near close-up, focusing on the artwork as the primary visual subject. Avoid wide shots, fisheye lenses, and distorted room architecture.
prompt_blocks.scale_direction: Maintain realistic physical scale. The artwork's physical dimensions of 120cm width by 80cm height must look accurate and proportionate relative to its immediate surroundings.
prompt_blocks.lighting_direction: The lighting in the room is soft natural light. The light must cast subtle, soft shadows from the canvas onto the wall to emphasize the canvas depth of 4cm.
prompt_blocks.material_direction: The materials in the space feature refined materials, providing a clean and tactile texture to the surrounding environment.
prompt_blocks.commercial_direction: The environment is styled for a premium exhibition presentation, avoiding a generic stock-room appearance.
prompt_blocks.negative_prompt: Avoid distorted perspective, cropped edges, altered colors, simplified artwork, wide shots (unless explicitly requested), fisheye perspective, distorted room architecture, generic stock-room appearance, excessive depth-of-field blur, or any redesign/repainting of the artwork.

approved_prompts.final_prompt:
[ARTWORK REFERENCE]
Use the resolved root view file 'base_artwork_gemini_job_1782392482_6423_v1.png' as the authoritative physical reference for the artwork. The artwork's original composition, proportions, colors, marks, textures, and overall visual identity must be preserved exactly, with no modifications.

[PHYSICAL ARTWORK SPECIFICATION]
The physical object is a 'stretched_canvas' with dimensions of 120cm width × 80cm height × 4cm depth (horizontal orientation). Visible edges: Yes. Edge finish: not specified. Paint continues on edges: not detected.

[SCENE CONTEXT]
The scene is a gallery/residential space with a refined and contemplative atmosphere. Context description: An abstract artwork displays three distinct, vibrantly colored geometric forms set within a deep, layered field of dark reds and browns.. The artwork prominently features three luminous block-like forms, asymmetrically placed across an expansive, dark terrain. The composition is organized by subtle horizontal divisions, suggesting layered fields that recede into depth. Within these blocks, vibrant turquoise and energetic red pigments are applied with visible texture and active brushwork. A profound, almost atmospheric quality emerges from the interplay of deep background and luminous foreground elements. This piece holds a quiet, yet powerful, structural presence across its considerable horizontal format.

[ARTWORK PLACEMENT]
The artwork must be hung flat and centered on a vertical wall. All edges of the canvas must be visible to show its 4cm depth, casting realistic, soft shadows onto the wall.

[CAMERA DIRECTION]
The camera view is biased towards a frontal angle. The composition must be a close-up or near close-up, focusing on the artwork as the primary visual subject. Avoid wide shots, fisheye lenses, and distorted room architecture.

[SCALE DIRECTION]
Maintain realistic physical scale. The artwork's physical dimensions of 120cm width by 80cm height must look accurate and proportionate relative to its immediate surroundings.

[LIGHTING DIRECTION]
The lighting in the room is soft natural light. The light must cast subtle, soft shadows from the canvas onto the wall to emphasize the canvas depth of 4cm.

[MATERIAL DIRECTION]
The materials in the space feature refined materials, providing a clean and tactile texture to the surrounding environment.

[COMMERCIAL DIRECTION]
The environment is styled for a premium exhibition presentation, avoiding a generic stock-room appearance.

[NEGATIVE PROMPT]
Avoid distorted perspective, cropped edges, altered colors, simplified artwork, wide shots (unless explicitly requested), fisheye perspective, distorted room architecture, generic stock-room appearance, excessive depth-of-field blur, or any redesign/repainting of the artwork.

Context description: This expressive piece features a rich, dark surface where contrasting areas of bright red and turquoise emerge with visible textural complexity.. A vast field of deep maroon dominates the canvas, creating a rich and resonant visual ground. Against this, areas of reddish-brown and vivid, almost electric, blue and red appear as distinct, textured events. The surface reveals an interplay of smooth, deep pigment with areas of gestural mark-making and layered color within the focal forms. An atmosphere of enigmatic depth and restrained energy is carefully constructed through this material dialogue. The work asserts a significant, tactile presence through its carefully worked and deeply colored surface.
